evidence: "Good family film. Enjoyable for all ages."
"Shows problems within a family but demonstrates the strength of family members supporting one another."
"Light plot, good story and very enjoyable."
"Simple but pretty enjoyable flick. Good light entertainment."
"Movie moves fast, has humor and is enjoyable."
"Good movie to watch but you have to watch carefully to keep in touch with what is going on."
"Shows companionship & love and has some good music to go with it."
"Very good story revealing trials & tribulations of once successful elderly in retirement."
"Interesting movie showing the power of friendship and lack of. In the end, love overcomes all."

summary: The user enjoys family-oriented films with simple narratives and fast pacing. They appreciate emotional depth and positive messages, often highlighting the importance of relationships and personal growth.
